root_cause: Cloud LoadBalancer provisioning failed for Service
evidence: Service shop/checkout-public is type LoadBalancer and selects pod checkout-api-6c8d9f7d95-x4m2q
Service status.loadBalancer.ingress is empty, so no external address has been assigned
Latest LoadBalancer provisioning failure reason: SyncLoadBalancerFailed
Latest LoadBalancer provisioning failure message: Error syncing load balancer: failed to ensure load balancer: AccessDenied for elasticloadbalancing:CreateLoadBalancer using the cluster service role
Observed 5 cloud LoadBalancer provisioning failure occurrence(s) within 30 minutes
No successful LoadBalancer provisioning event was observed after the latest failure
LoadBalancer provisioning failures persisted for 5.0 minutes

causes.message: Service 'checkout-public' exposes the workload through a cloud LoadBalancer
The cloud provider could not provision or reconcile the external load balancer
External clients cannot reach the workload until the LoadBalancer is provisioned

service:checkout-public: LoadBalancer Service has no assigned external ingress
Error syncing load balancer: failed to ensure load balancer: AccessDenied for elasticloadbalancing:CreateLoadBalancer using the cluster service role
pod:checkout-api-6c8d9f7d95-x4m2q: Pod is selected by Service 'checkout-public', whose external LoadBalancer is not provisioned
timeline:loadbalancer: Error syncing load balancer: failed to ensure load balancer: AccessDenied for elasticloadbalancing:CreateLoadBalancer using the cluster service role

likely_causes: Cloud subnet tags or route configuration do not allow load balancer placement
Cloud quota or load balancer limits prevent creating another load balancer
The cloud-controller-manager or load balancer controller lacks required IAM permissions
Security group, firewall, or availability-zone constraints prevent provider reconciliation
suggested_checks: Check cloud-controller-manager or cloud load balancer controller logs for reconciliation errors
Verify subnet tags, availability zones, security groups, and cloud load balancer quotas
Confirm controller IAM permissions for creating and tagging load balancers, listeners, target groups, and security groups
